reviews.comment:
Un clavo más o menos. Llegamos a las 3:00 a.m. y uno de los playeros con su muy mala onda nos dice: "No hay combustible, tenés de acá 150km más allá para cargar". Considero que al ser el único en la zona, no debería de faltarle stock. Deja mucho que desear ya que en mi caso contamos con poco combustible para llegar a destino y necesitamos cargar.

(Translated by Google)
A real hassle. We arrived at 3:00 a.m. and one of the attendants, in a very unfriendly manner, told us: "There's no fuel, you have to go 150 km further on to fill up." I figured that since it's the only station in the area, he shouldn't be short of stock. It leaves much to be desired, especially since in my case we only have a little fuel to get to our destination and we needed to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoeXR2el9nRRAB
